code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn is_digit(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b >= 48 and b <= 57
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  mut has_positive = false

  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let b0 = byte_or_zero(line, i)
      if b0 == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b0 == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      while i < n and is_digit(line, i)
        let bi = byte_or_zero(line, i)
        val = val * 10 + (bi - 48)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      if signed > 0
        if not has_positive
          max_val = signed
          has_positive = true
        else if signed > max_val
          max_val = signed
        end
      end
    end
  end

  if has_positive
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
